candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows directional agreement but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as unvalidated and freeze new entries on that pair regardless of conviction score.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches counts times the current live indicator fingerprint historically matched a WINNING configuration; zero matches means the present state has no precedent in the profitable memory bank — conviction% is measuring instantaneous agreement, not forward edge, so acting on it is trading a pattern the system has never won on.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_dir != 'NEUTRAL' and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: return ConsensusVeto()  # require green_matches >= 1 before sizing on 30-indicator direction
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces low-quality entries during unvalidated regimes; expected to lift win rate 2-4% and Sharpe +0.02-0.04 by eliminating trades with no historical profitable analog.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: All five pairs currently show green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% despite GBPUSD conv=50% LONG and AUDUSD/AUDNZD conv=42% SHORT — the system is generating directional calls with zero historical winning precedent, and 0 trades fired in the last 7 days, consistent with the system correctly hesitating on unvalidated states.

retirement_flag.reason: Pair-specific macro half-lives (GBPUSD 6d, AUDUSD 5d, etc.) were calibrated in a prior regime; with 10Y-2Y at 0.35% NORMAL and CPI decelerating, macro signal persistence may be shifting — worth re-validating half-lives against recent closed trades once sample accumulates.

reflection.system_health_note: System is correctly in a hesitation state — 0 trades in 7 days, regime UNKNOWN internally, TradingView blank, and all consensus pairs at green_matches=0, so the freeze reflects appropriate epistemic caution rather than a fault.
